items.title: Bitcoin price taps new July high above $62K on weak US jobs data
items.summary: Bitcoin took daily gains to nearly 4% on the second day of "green July" as US labor-market signals supported an easing inflation policy from the Federal Reserve.

items.title: Crypto Shorts Get Rekt as Bitcoin, Ethereum and XRP Rise to Weekly High Prices
items.summary: Bitcoin continued rising after hitting a 21-month-low earlier this week, topping $62,000 and leading a broader crypto market rebound.

items.title: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
items.summary: Strategy is a registered US government contractor, though Kash Patel claimed that “no current conflict exists” with his $100,001 and $250,000 worth of the company’s stock that he reported late.

items.title: EToro invests in onchain derivatives platform Extended as brokers race into DeFi
items.summary: The broker plans to bring perpetual futures into Zengo wallet and expand DeFi products to its core platform as rivals like Robinhood expand onchain offerings.

items.title: Bitwise says STRC selloff signals crypto cycle nearing a bottom, not Strategy’s breaking point
items.summary: Bitwise said STRC's volatility reflects a late-cycle leverage unwind, with institutions poised to replace Strategy as bitcoin's biggest buyer.

items.summary: Broadridge and transfer agent Oasis Pro underpin a new structure that keeps tokenized securities within existing U.S. market rules, based on the SEC's third-party custodial model.

items.summary: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

items.title: JPMorgan says Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds 'two-way risk' to crypto markets
items.summary: The bank said Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds avoidable market uncertainty and should be replaced with equity issuance to build cash reserves.

items.title: Metaplanet Adds 2,823 Bitcoin in Q2 as Buying Pace Cools
items.summary: The Japanese firm's 43,000-BTC stack now sits well below its cost basis, and it has leaned on debt over equity to keep buying.

items.title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
items.summary: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

items.title: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
items.summary: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.

items.title: U.S. payroll growth slowed sharply in June, with only 57,000 jobs added
items.summary: This morning's data could slow market expectations for a Fed rate hike as soon as this summer or early Fall.

items.title: A struggling Nasdaq-listed company that tried to copy Saylor's Bitcoin playbook is completely dumping crypto for AI
items.summary: The Nasdaq-listed Korean media company once lined up $1 billion in financing to buy 10,000 bitcoin. A recent filing confirms its balance is now zero as it pivots to AI infrastructure and fights to stay listed.

items.summary: SBI Crypto will shut down its Bitcoin mining pool on July 31 after more than five years, ranking 12th globally with about 2.2% of hashrate share.

items.summary: Bitcoin rose after Fed Chair Kevin Warsh said inflation risks had eased. A 7.9% drop in South Korea's Kospi on renewed AI chip worries did little to dent the bid.
